project_name: St. Anthony Catholic Church AIT Alagbado

primary.name: Martyr's Crimson
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, Liturgical highlights, Important borders

surface.description: Slightly darker/lighter than bg for cards

public_pages.alignment: Center for Hero/Sacred titles, Left for reading content
public_pages.containers: Max width 1400px, but allow full-width image breaks

buttons.primary: bg-church-red text-white hover:bg-red-900 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-cinzel text-sm px-8 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: border border-church-gold text-church-red hover:bg-church-gold/10 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-cinzel text-sm px-8 py-3

cards.style: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-stone-200/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg overflow-hidden

navigation.style: Sticky, Glassmorphism (Crystal Glass), border-b border-white/20 backdrop-blur-xl

inputs.style: bg-white/80 border-stone-200 focus:border-church-gold focus:ring-1 focus:ring-church-gold rounded-md

do_not: Use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF)
must_do: Use detailed textures (grain, noise) in backgrounds to avoid digital flatness

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors defined above.
Add the Google Fonts import to index.css.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Navbar and Footer globally.
Ensure the Admin Panel is protected by a Layout that checks for JWT.
For the Gallery, use a Masonry layout (Tetris Grid) instead of equal squares.
For Sermons, create a video player wrapper that looks like a cinema frame.
